title: ophiorrhiza microphylla
intro: Ophiorrhiza microphylla, also known as the small-leaved snake wood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Ophiorrhiza microphylla lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the roots of Ophiorrhiza microphylla are often dried and powdered to be used in teas, capsules, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
